acceptanceCriteria: scripts/bump-version.mjs updates every version-bearing Babysitter marketplace/install manifest that participates in plugin update comparison.

scripts/sync-workspace-versions.mjs and the staging sync workflow propagate the resolved release or staging prerelease version into unified plugin version files before generated external plugin output is produced.
Generated marketplace output uses the unified release version instead of stale hard-coded labels.
A deterministic regression guardrail fails when plugin content or gitCommitSha advances while the marketplace version label remains unchanged.
The implementation preserves unrelated local changes and avoids broad manifest churn outside the release/plugin version surfaces needed for #531.

knownIssueContext.title: claude plugin update is a silent no-op - plugin version in marketplace.json never bumps across releases
knownIssueContext.reportedFailure: Claude compares the marketplace manifest version label and reports the installed plugin is already current when that label stays stale, even if the plugin cache gitCommitSha points at old content.
knownIssueContext.reportedWorkaround: claude plugin uninstall babysitter@a5c.ai && claude plugin install babysitter@a5c.ai
